skills.name: Spatial Arbitrage
skills.description: Buy the lowest-ask venue and sell the highest-bid venue when the spread beats fees + transfer.

skills.name: Triangular Arbitrage
skills.description: A to B to C to A loops within one venue when cross rates misalign.

skills.name: Funding-Rate Carry
skills.description: Long spot / short perp (or vice-versa) to collect funding payments.

skills.name: Stablecoin Peg
skills.description: Trade USDT/USDC/DAI deviations back toward the $1 peg.

skills.name: Maker Rebate Harvest
skills.description: Post-only liquidity to capture maker rebates on rebate venues.

skills.name: Volatility Breakout
skills.description: Ride momentum on volatility spikes; widen or pause when spreads blow out.

skills.name: Internal Rebalancer
skills.description: Trade the gap between the internal MasterNoder price and the global external mid.

skills.name: Latency TWAP
skills.description: Split large fills across venues over time to reduce slippage.

skills.name: Inventory Band
skills.description: Keep target inventory per asset per venue and trade back to the band.

skills.name: Withdrawal-Aware Routing
skills.description: Only act when the spread exceeds taker fees + transfer + network cost.

skills.name: Mean-Reversion Scalp
skills.description: Fade over-extended moves back toward a short rolling mean.

skills.name: Cross-Pair Momentum
skills.description: Trade momentum that leads across correlated pairs (e.g. BTC leading alts).

skills.name: Statistical Arbitrage (Z-Score)
skills.description: Cointegrated pairs (e.g. ETH/BTC): enter when the spread z-score exceeds ~2.0, exit on reversion to mean, stop at z=3.0. Dollar-neutral legs.

skills.name: Avellaneda-Stoikov Market Making
skills.description: Quote two-sided liquidity with reservation price + adaptive inventory skew; widen spreads in volatility to dodge adverse selection. 78-85% win rate.

skills.name: AI Sentiment Alpha
skills.description: Ensemble model ingests news + social sentiment and trades probability gaps before the market re-prices. ~1.8x avg win multiple.

skills.name: Latency Momentum (Oracle Lag)
skills.description: Exploit sub-100ms lag between on-chain oracle prints and exchange order books; ride 5-minute momentum early. High volatility, 8-15% monthly potential.

skills.name: Adaptive ML Forecaster
skills.description: Kalman/GARCH-style spread forecasting with an online-learning ensemble that re-weights features as profit accrues.

skills.name: Kelly Position Sizing
skills.description: Meta-skill: size every trade by the Kelly criterion for max long-run log growth, with drawdown kill-switches. Compounds the edge of every other skill.

skill_sets.name: Starter Arbitrage Set
skill_sets.description: Entry cross-venue spreads with withdrawal and network-cost awareness.

skill_sets.name: Pro Triangular Set
skill_sets.description: In-venue loops, peg trades, and TWAP execution.

skill_sets.name: Funding Carry Set
skill_sets.description: Perp funding harvest with inventory band control.

skill_sets.name: Elite Momentum Set
skill_sets.description: Directional breakout and momentum with mean-reversion scalps.

skill_sets.name: Quant Multi-Skill Set
skill_sets.description: Six-strategy quant blend across arbitrage, carry, and rebates.

skill_sets.name: Sentient Apex Set
skill_sets.description: Super-tier AI + stat-arb + market making with adaptive sizing.

skill_sets.name: Cross-Exchange Daemon Set
skill_sets.description: 24/7 venue farming with spatial arb and latency momentum.

skill_sets.name: AI Multi-Venue Daemon Set
skill_sets.description: Premium AI daemon scanning with Kelly-sized farm legs.
